error_signature: Can’t determine which item to use
title: Ambiguous item selection in workflow
symptom: n8n throws an error stating 'Can’t determine which item to use' when trying to reference an item from a node's output. This occurs when the output contains multiple items and n8n cannot infer which one to use.
applies_when: Using a node that outputs multiple items
Referencing an item without a clear selector
root_cause: The error occurs because n8n requires a specific item reference when multiple items are present in the output. Without an explicit selector, n8n cannot determine which item to use, leading to ambiguity.
fix_steps: Identify the node that outputs multiple items
Replace the generic item reference (e.g., .item) with an explicit selector like .first()
agent_instruction: Use an explicit selector like .first() to specify which item to reference.
